localPath.description: Absolute path to the pod-local payload-store directory.

metadataCacheIdentifier.description: TYPO3 cache frontend identifier that stores the central metadata. The consumer configures this frontend and picks the backend themselves (e.g. KeyValueBackend, Typo3DatabaseBackend, etc.).

minCompressedBytes.description: Payloads smaller than this size are stored uncompressed on disk (a one-byte marker indicates the on-disk codec). Skip-compress avoids the gzdeflate/zstd_compress fixed cost on tiny values like rootline or hash entries. Set to 0 to always compress.

backendVersionEnvVar.description: Name of the environment variable that supplies a deploy-scoped identifier (e.g. image tag, commit SHA, release version). The value is folded into the cache-entry hash so that each deploy automatically invalidates previous cache entries. Set to a variable that changes per deploy in your CI/CD (default: IMAGE_TAG).
